tender.description: Renewal by SDBC on following motor roads in Dharampur Constituency under Annual Repair (1) Majra Bhuddi-Shekhuwala Dharmawala motor road (2) Internal roads of Prakash Lok (3) Road in Lakhi Bagh from Saharanpur Road via Crematorium to Bhandari Bagh.
